title: AI & Blockchain Product Manager
summary: Experienced product & ML/AI engineer with 5+ years across automation, blockchain, and full-stack product development. Built and scaled AI/LLM pipelines (RAG, embeddings, semantic search), automation systems, and production-ready applications for startups, enterprises, and universities. Founded and led AI/blockchain companies, delivering 30+ automation solutions and 20+ web platforms. Advised a leading bank on a $500K crypto portfolio and developed an NFT diploma verification system for a major Central Asian university.
